title: Penguin Run Game
description: This is a super Penguin Run Game bound to keep you entertained - Watch as the Penguins race up the moving stairs and slide down the track to start all over again, with musical stairs and lights around the track. This wonderful game is loads of fun for all children to enjoy, and even parents too. Simply slot the track together following the number order and the diagram on the box. Included: 1 musical light-up staircase, 3 roller penguins, 3 track pieces, 3 flags, 1 flag sticker sheet and 1 header card. Suitable for those over the age of 3 years. Players required: 1 - 3 players. Requires: 3 x 'AA' (not included)
